flags.message: The predict prompt tells cert predictors to anchor on the 'Modern discretionary-cert petitions by disposition' section of metrics/statpack.md, but the committed statpack (both .md and .json) has no such section — only 'Cases by court', 'SCOTUS petitions by nature-of-suit topic', 'SCOTUS petitions by originating circuit', and the by-Term table (whose recent Terms show 0 resolved). I fell back to the overall SCOTUS resolved base rate (granted 1.4%) plus 2020s-era fedcourts query priors. Either the statpack refresh dropped the section or the prompt is ahead of it; regenerating the statpack or aligning the prompt would restore the intended anchor.
